archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro / Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Hybrid for Forensic Command-Center)
design_principles: High Signal Density: Pack information tightly but structure it meticulously using grids.
Color is Function Only: The UI is 95% monochrome. Color only exists to indicate trust status (Trusted, Suspicious, Fraudulent, Review).
Explainability First: Never show a raw score without its confidence interval and reason codes.
Forensic but Accessible: Use monospace fonts for data and hashes, but keep headers plain and readable.

rules: Use IBM Plex Mono for all scores, IP addresses, reason codes, and timestamps.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Never use pure black or pure gray. Always tint backgrounds slightly with blue (#08090A) to feel active.
Primary actions (like 'Block' or 'Observe') should match semantic colors, avoiding generic primary blues.
Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing.
Max 6px border-radius (rounded-md) for a sharp, forensic feel.
Use technical grid borders: border-collapse style with subtle borders on right and bottom of items.
Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-4 or p-6) to prevent text collision.

surfaces: Dashboard Cards: Flat background (#121417), 1px subtle border, no shadow.
Sticky Headers: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#08090A]/70) with 1px bottom border.
components.charts: Shadcn/Recharts customized to use strictly the semantic color palette (Trusted/Suspicious/Fraudulent).
components.tables: Dense rows, monospace text for values, sticky header. Hover state must highlight the entire row slightly (bg-surface_hover).
components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-md). Subtle 1px solid borders. Hover state text must explicitly be defined (e.g. hover:text-white).

motion.micro_interactions: Hover states on all rows and cards slightly lift background color and border brightness. No bouncy animations.

icons.style: duotone or regular, depending on emphasis. Dense technical interface benefits from Phosphor's crisp geometry.

login_background.description: Subtle dark abstract texture for the JWT login/signup screens to avoid flat black backgrounds.

team_avatars.description: User profile avatar for the workspace navigation/settings.
Secondary user profile avatar for audit logs or team tables.

rules: Use actual logos (SVG paths or external brand icons) for GA4, Google Ads, Meta Ad integrations. Do not use placeholder text.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Convention: kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid="traffic-quality-chart" or data-testid="block-session-button".

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a dark-theme, forensic-style SaaS application. Do not use light mode or generic SaaS templates.
Make heavy use of IBM Plex Mono for data density (reason codes, IPs, scores, confidence levels).
Never show a raw score without context. Always pair a score with a semantic color (e.g., Red for Fraud) and a reason code pill.
Do not use generic blue/purple gradients. Color is for signaling threat levels only.
Implement the layout with the 'Control Room Grid' philosophy: tight gaps (gap-4), strict column alignment, every pixel utilized.
Ensure the login/signup uses the abstract background image and JWT auth screens are implemented.
All components MUST use pure Tailwind styling integrated with Shadcn conventions, bypassing default border-radii for sharper edges (rounded-md max).
